title: Agent Runtime mock/local para agentes documentales MVP
commands: python -m devpilot_core agent run documentation-audit --target docs/01_requirements --json
pass_criteria: AgentRuntime resolves agents from executable MIASI registry.
Only implemented MVP document agents can run in Sprint 12.
Every tool-like operation is evaluated by PolicyEngine.
No external APIs or API keys are required.
CLI output follows CommandResult and remains JSON-parseable.
block_criteria: Missing or invalid MIASI executable registry.
Draft output already exists in execute mode.
risks: Rule-based agents only; no LLM yet.
No real tool runtime for shell, Git write, patch apply or external models.
next_sprint: FUNC-SPRINT-13 — Evaluation Harness para validadores y agentes
